basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for IT Professional IV and Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR - Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-IARI is recruiting IT Professional-IV and Senior Research Fellow for the FASAL 2.0 project under the Division of Agricultural Physics.

age_limit.age_details: DES, Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare

qualification.details: For IT Professional-IV: | Master’s (M.Sc./M.Tech.) in Computer Science / IT / Computer Engineering / Data Science or equivalent with minimum 3 years experience. Strong technical skills in Linux, databases, Python, JavaScript, Geoportal development, etc. | For Senior Research Fellow (SRF): | Master’s degree in Agricultural Physics / Agrometeorology / Geoinformatics / Remote Sensing / Environmental Sciences or related fields with required OGPA / marks and NET/GATE (as per ICAR guidelines). Age: Max 35 years (men), 40 years (women) with relaxations. | IT Professional-IV: | Create database management system Develop user-friendly interface for yield forecasting Web GeoPortal development with Geoserver / Leaflet | Senior Research Fellow: | Remote sensing data analysis Crop modelling and simulations Machine learning applications in agriculture

how_to_apply: Fill the application in the prescribed proforma (Annexure-I).
Attach scanned copies of all original documents as a single PDF.
Submit through Google Form: https://forms.gle/EYeuXdVWDqjZXLcX7 by 24th July 2026.
Mention active email ID and mobile number.
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Initial tenure up to 1 year, extendable based on performance. No TA/DA for interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR IARI IT Professional and SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI IT Professional and SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: The Head, Division of Agricultural Physics, ICAR-IARI, Pusa, New Delhi-110012 invites applications for IT Professional-IV and Senior Research Fellow (SRF) on purely temporary/contractual basis in the FASAL 2.0 project funded by DES, Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare. Download ICAR IARI IT Professional and SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI IT Professional and SRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-IARI is recruiting IT Professional-IV and Senior Research Fellow for the FASAL 2.0 project under the Division of Agricultural Physics.

rows.icar_indian_agricultural_research_instit: DES, Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For IT Professional-IV: Master’s (M.Sc./M.Tech.) in Computer Science / IT / Computer Engineering / Data Science or equivalent with minimum 3 years experience. Strong technical skills in Linux, databases, Python, JavaScript, Geoportal development, etc. For Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Master’s degree in Agricultural Physics / Agrometeorology / Geoinformatics / Remote Sensing / Environmental Sciences or related fields with required OGPA / marks and NET/GATE (as per ICAR guidelines). Age: Max 35 years (men), 40 years (women) with relaxations. IT Professional-IV: Create database management system Develop user-friendly interface for yield forecasting Web GeoPortal development with Geoserver / Leaflet Senior Research Fellow: Remote sensing data analysis Crop modelling and simulations Machine learning applications in agriculture

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the application in the prescribed proforma (Annexure-I). Attach scanned copies of all original documents as a single PDF. Submit through Google Form: https://forms.gle/EYeuXdVWDqjZXLcX7 by 24th July 2026. Mention active email ID and mobile number.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR IARI Candidates
content_sections.text: Positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Initial tenure up to 1 year, extendable based on performance. No TA/DA for interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI IT Professional IV and Senior Research Fellow Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IARI FASAL 2.0 Project 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are announced in ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 2 posts – 1 IT Professional-IV and 1 Senior Research Fellow (SRF).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for IT Professional-IV at IARI?
faq.answer: ₹60,000 per month (consolidated) with 3% annual increment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the emolument for Senior Research Fellow at ICAR IARI?
faq.answer: ₹37,000 + HRA (1st & 2nd year) and ₹42,000 + HRA (3rd year).

faq.question: Q5. What is the essential qualification for IARI IT Professional-IV?
faq.answer: Master’s degree in Computer Science/IT/Data Science with minimum 3 years relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IARI SRF and IT Professional positions?
faq.answer: Submit application through the Google Form link along with documents in single PDF by 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Senior Research Fellow at IARI?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years for men and 40 years for women (with applicable relaxations).

faq.question: Q8. Is NET/GATE mandatory for IARI SRF position?
faq.answer: Yes, as per ICAR guidelines (exemptions apply for Ph.D. holders and certain professional degrees).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IARI FASAL 2.0 project location?
faq.answer: Division of Agricultural Physics, ICAR-IARI, Pusa, New Delhi-110012.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be an interview for IARI IT Professional and SRF selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for online/in-person interview. Final results will be published on IARI website.
